keyEvents.text: Goal! Haiti 1, Nicaragua 0. Louicius Deedson (Haiti) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Josué Casimir.
Hannes Delcroix (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. Duckens Nazon replaces Frantzdy Pierrot because of an injury.
Goal! Haiti 2, Nicaragua 0. Ruben Providence (Haiti) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Carlens Arcus with a cross.
Henry Niño (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Byron Bonilla replaces Ariel Arauz.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Anyelo Velásquez replaces Óscar Acevedo.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Jason Coronel replaces Henry Niño.

Duckens Nazon (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
